arguments: task objective, target paths, and required evidence
body: Split work across independent agents with non-overlapping paths, merge results, and produce a single verified outcome. Use this route when implementation spans multiple ownership areas, provider surfaces, packages, test tiers, or independent investigation paths. Record each subagent task, owned paths, expected evidence, and merge order before broad edits. The route declares owner, permissions, allowed tools, validation expectations, output contract, hook expectations, and provider-specific differences.
